baseline.notes: baseline default dry-run only until explicit launch approval

overrides.notes: V4Test00 baseline model_seed=0 dry-run only; launch requires explicit approval after registry and metrics checks pass
V4 P1.1b baseline normalization variant; semantic_normalization_v1 selects the V4 runner; all training parameters match V4Test00_baseline_seed_0
V4 P1 semantic normalization ablation: BC flags binary passthrough only; k, q, top_h, and BC temperature scalars stay legacy z-score; other training parameters match V4Test00_baseline_seed_0
V4 P1 semantic normalization ablation: q signed log1p only; k, BC flags, top_h, and BC temperature scalars stay legacy z-score; other training parameters match V4Test00_baseline_seed_0
V4 P1 semantic normalization ablation: k log transform only; q, BC flags, top_h, and BC temperature scalars stay legacy z-score; other training parameters match V4Test00_baseline_seed_0
V4 P1 decoder physical bypass: post-decoder residual from full normalized condition features; baseline training parameters match V4Test00_baseline_seed_0
V4 P1 decoder bypass residual-scale ablation: full normalized condition bypass with residual_scale=0.5; other parameters match V4P1_05
V4 P1 decoder bypass residual-scale ablation: full normalized condition bypass with residual_scale=0.25; other parameters match V4P1_05
V4 P1 combo: BC flags binary passthrough semantic condition profile plus V4P1_05 full-condition decoder bypass at residual_scale=1.0
V4 P1 combo: BC flags binary passthrough semantic condition profile plus full-condition decoder bypass at residual_scale=0.5; based on V4P1_08
V4 P1 non-periodic coordinate encoding ablation: raw_plus_fourier freq4 on train_minmax_to_unit_box coordinates; Heat3D graph remains periodic=False; other parameters match baseline
V4 P1 combo based on V4P1_09: BC flags binary passthrough plus full-condition decoder bypass residual_scale=0.5, changing only coordinate encoding to non-periodic raw_plus_fourier freq4
V4 P1 train-consistent IID split control based on V4P1_09; only split_map_path and output/log paths change
V4 P2.01 based on V4P1_12: replace is_top/is_bottom/is_side/is_interior with per-axis normalized boundary distance channels; keep train_minmax_to_unit_box coordinates and V4P1_12 training parameters
V4 P2.02 based on V4P1_12: use sample_local_isotropic xyz coordinate normalization and broadcast log extent/aspect features; keep legacy BC flags and V4P1_12 training parameters

V4 P2.03 combines sample_local_isotropic xyz coordinates, isotropic-scale boundary distances using L_ref=max(Lx,Ly,Lz), and log extent/aspect broadcast; other V4P1_12 training parameters unchanged. Previous per-axis-distance V4P2_03 results are invalidated and must be rerun.
V4P3 candidate1024_v0 transfer of V4P2_01: boundary_distance_replacement feature path; dataset/split/output identity changed; batch set to B32 for candidate1024 memory fit; no valid_stress split.

V4P3 candidate1024_v0 transfer of V4P2_02 best P2 config: sample_local_isotropic xyz plus log extent broadcast; dataset/split/output identity changed; batch set to B32 for candidate1024 memory fit; no valid_stress split.

V4P3 candidate1024_v0 transfer of V4P2_03: boundary distance plus sample_local_isotropic xyz/log extent path; dataset/split/output identity changed; batch set to B32 for candidate1024 memory fit; no valid_stress split.
V4P3_04 is the B24 variant of V4P3_01; all dataset, split, feature, model, optimizer, loss, diagnostics, and final-probe settings are unchanged.
V4P3_05 is the B24 variant of V4P3_02; all dataset, split, feature, model, optimizer, loss, diagnostics, and final-probe settings are unchanged.
V4P3_06 is the B24 variant of V4P3_03; all dataset, split, feature, model, optimizer, loss, diagnostics, and final-probe settings are unchanged.
V4P3_07 reruns the V4P3_06 combined candidate with the memory-optimized runner defaults and B32; dataset, formal split, model, optimizer, loss, diagnostics, and final-probe settings are unchanged.
V4P3_08 is the B32 memory-optimized V4P3_05 comparator for WSL2: sample_local_isotropic plus log extent and decoder bypass are kept, while boundary_distance_replacement is not used.
V4P3_09 was the V4P3_07 message-passing-depth ablation; processor_steps=8 failed under the current B32/latent96/AdamW memory budget. status=oom_failed; reason=processor_steps8_oom.
V4P3_10 was the V4P3_08 message-passing-depth ablation; processor_steps=8 failed under the current B32/latent96/AdamW memory budget. status=oom_failed; reason=processor_steps8_oom.

V4P3_11 is the E200 short/base control based on V4P3_08; only epochs changes from 600 to 200, while processor_steps=6, B32, formal split, valid_iid prediction, model, solver, optimizer, and loss remain unchanged.
V4P3_12 is V4P3_11 plus full semantic condition transform for k/q/BC scalar audit; processor_steps=6, B32, E200, formal split, and valid_iid prediction remain unchanged.

V4P3_13 is V4P3_12 plus light background calibration: background_relative_weight=0.05 and background_over_weight=0.02, targeting bin0/le0.05 overprediction without changing model, solver, optimizer, or split.

V4P3_14 is V4P3_12 plus light strong-q/hotspot weighting: strong_q_weight=0.05 and hotspot_weight=0.05, targeting q_power_bin_2/top-DeltaT weak points without changing model, solver, optimizer, or split.
V4 P1 decoder bypass smoke epoch=5; prediction export, final-probe, and post-training diagnostics disabled
V4Test00 baseline model_seed=1 dry-run only; launch requires explicit approval after registry and metrics checks pass
V4Test00 baseline model_seed=2 dry-run only; launch requires explicit approval after registry and metrics checks pass
V4Test00 baseline epoch=1 remote launch smoke; prediction export, final-probe, and post-training diagnostics disabled
V4P3_15: V4P3_11 E300 fresh. Test whether longer cosine schedule preserves final checkpoint advantage.
V4P3_16: V4P3_11 E400 fresh. Test slower cosine decay benefit on split-aware metrics.
V4P3_17: V4P3_11 final low-lr continuation (lr=5e-5 constant). Key experiment: continue from params_final without changing first 200-epoch trajectory.
V4P3_18: V4P3_14 E300 fresh. V4P3_14 best at e175, test if E300 continues improving or overfits.
V4P3_19: V4P3_14 final low-lr continuation (lr=5e-5 constant). Test if current best model benefits from further training.
